core_mechanism: conditional-mean explained-variance decomposition (a correlation-ratio / nonlinear ANOVA functional) that measures how much of a target variable's variance is deterministically fixed by conditioning on a chosen subset of other variables versus left as residual variance
brief_reason: The method quantifies dependence via the correlation-ratio functional R(k|k_cut), explicitly interpreted as conditional-mean explained variance, to map how much of a target mode is deterministically determined (slaved) by a retained subset versus dominated by conditional residual variance.
